description: You are a mission operations training lead simulating a transient thermal anomaly on the live system to test ground control alarms using OpenC3 COSMOS. Artificially trigger an out-of-limits (OOL) telemetry anomaly for INST HEALTH_STATUS TEMP1 by temporarily lowering its YELLOW_HIGH limit below the current live temperature for at least 5.0 seconds. Capture the peak temperature reached during this anomaly window. Restore the original YELLOW_HIGH limit and reset any latched violation counters using the INST CLEAR command. Document the simulation in a structured JSON report at /home/ga/Desktop/simulated_anomaly_report.json including the target ('INST'), item ('TEMP1'), original_yellow_high, simulated_yellow_high, anomaly_start_time, anomaly_end_time, duration_seconds (>= 5.0), peak_value, and limits_restored (boolean). OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
